summary.en: On-demand food delivery connecting customers with local restaurants across Africa.
summary.zh: 連接顧客與當地餐廳的非洲隨需送餐服務。

highlight.en: Positions itself as Ethiopia's leading food delivery service, undercutting rivals on price and aiming to become Africa's super app.
highlight.zh: 自詡為衣索比亞領先的送餐服務,以低於同業的價格搶市,並立志成為非洲的超級應用程式。

summary.en: All-in-one app digitizing internal communication, culture, and HR processes for companies.
summary.zh: 將企業內部溝通、文化與人資流程數位化的一站式應用程式。

highlight.en: Centralizes company-employee interaction in one customizable digital community, bundling Mini Apps from chat and surveys to onboarding, increasingly AI-powered.
highlight.zh: 在單一可自訂的數位社群集中公司與員工互動,整合從聊天、問卷到入職的迷你應用,並日益由 AI 驅動。

summary.en: Roofing platform matching homeowners with roofers and helping contractors find more jobs.
summary.zh: 媒合屋主與屋頂工人、並協助承包商接更多案子的屋頂修繕平台。

highlight.en: Tackles a market where all 80M-plus US homes will eventually need a new roof, using tech to let contractors focus on repairs while it handles matching.
highlight.zh: 瞄準全美逾 8,000 萬戶終將換屋頂的市場,以技術讓承包商專注修繕,由平台負責媒合。

summary.en: AI companion for nurses that automates admin work to free up more time for patient care.
summary.zh: 為護理人員打造的 AI 助手,自動化行政工作以釋出更多照護時間。

highlight.en: Says it gives nurses back up to 30% of their time by handling documentation, with adoption across 1,500+ care facilities and a $50M Series A led by Balderton.
highlight.zh: 宣稱透過處理文書工作為護理人員省回最多 30% 時間,導入逾 1,500 家機構,並獲 Balderton 領投 5,000 萬美元 A 輪。

summary.en: One-stop-shop platform for buying, selling, and renting real estate in Latin America.
summary.zh: 在拉丁美洲買賣與租賃房地產的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Uses technology to make buying, selling, and renting properties in LatAm faster and easier through a single real estate solutions hub.
highlight.zh: 以技術透過單一房地產解決方案樞紐,讓拉美的房產買賣與租賃更快速、更簡便。

summary.en: Curated Indonesian job portal and ATS matching top talent with companies.
summary.zh: 媒合頂尖人才與企業的印尼精選求職平台暨應徵者追蹤系統。

highlight.en: Pre-screens listings so seekers apply to multiple top companies in one click and hear back 21x faster, while 5,000+ partner firms get only vetted candidates.
highlight.zh: 預先篩選職缺,讓求職者一鍵應徵多家頂尖公司並以 21 倍速度收到回覆,5,000 多家合作企業只收到精選人選。

summary.en: Mobile app providing fast unsecured working capital loans to African micro businesses.
summary.zh: 為非洲微型企業提供快速無擔保營運資金貸款的行動應用程式。

highlight.en: Scores and disburses unsecured loans within a day to cash-based businesses with no digital history, providing $23M to 32,000 East African businesses since 2021.
highlight.zh: 為缺乏數位紀錄的現金型企業評分並於一天內撥款,自 2021 年起向東非 32,000 家企業提供 2,300 萬美元。

summary.en: B2B wholesale marketplace for second-hand and vintage fashion.
summary.zh: 二手與復古時尚的 B2B 批發市集。

highlight.en: Connects vintage stores and online resellers as buyers with used-clothing wholesalers, rag-houses, and donation centres as suppliers.
highlight.zh: 將復古商店與線上轉售商等買家,與舊衣批發商、舊衣回收場及捐贈中心等供應商串連起來。

summary.en: Smart cold chain fulfillment platform for cold-chain e-commerce and direct-to-retail.
summary.zh: 為冷鏈電商與直供零售商打造的智慧冷鏈履約平台。

highlight.en: Runs hyperlocal cold chain fulfillment centers with transport and a smart management system so sellers store, pick, pack, and deliver faster.
highlight.zh: 營運超本地化冷鏈履約中心,搭配運輸與智慧管理系統,讓賣家更快速地儲存、揀貨、包裝與配送。

summary.en: Platform turning shopping for physical collectibles into entertainment with instant liquidity.
summary.zh: 把收藏品購物變成娛樂、並提供即時流動性的平台。

highlight.en: Lets users open digital packs to reveal vaulted, insured physical trading cards, comics, and watches, keeping favorites or selling back at a guaranteed price.
highlight.zh: 讓用戶開啟數位卡包揭曉經保管投保的實體交易卡、漫畫與手錶,可保留或以保證價格回售。

summary.en: Online platform helping LatAm developers sell new properties and close mortgages faster.
summary.zh: 協助拉美開發商更快銷售新建案並完成房貸的線上平台。

highlight.en: Unifies the home-buying experience online so buyers skip intermediaries, claiming selling homes and approving mortgages runs 6x faster.
highlight.zh: 在線上整合購屋體驗讓買家省去中間人,宣稱售屋與房貸核准速度提升 6 倍。

summary.en: Global neobank offering a single account to manage money across countries.
summary.zh: 提供單一帳戶跨國管理資金的全球新型銀行。

highlight.en: Aims to build a bank unbound by borders, letting users make international payments at live Google rates, access credit in new countries, and invest globally.
highlight.zh: 力圖打造不受國界限制的銀行,讓用戶以即時 Google 匯率國際付款、在新國家取得信貸並在全球投資。

summary.en: Robotics company automating fish-harvesting techniques for longer-lasting, better-tasting fish.
summary.zh: 以機器人自動化處理魚技術、讓魚更耐放更美味的公司。

highlight.en: Automates artisanal high-end sushi techniques with robotics to replace suffocation and electrocution, which damage meat, extending shelf-life at scale.
highlight.zh: 以機器人自動化高端壽司的職人技法,取代會傷害魚肉的窒息與電擊方式,大規模延長保鮮期。

summary.en: AI-powered construction management software unifying site teams, procurement, design, and finance.
summary.zh: 統合工地團隊、採購、設計與財務的 AI 建築管理軟體。

highlight.en: Unifies construction workflows out of the box without custom integration, claiming the fastest deployment and compatibility with most accounting and ERP tools.
highlight.zh: 開箱即整合建築工作流程而無需客製串接,宣稱部署速度最快並相容多數會計與 ERP 工具。

summary.en: AI platform helping general contractors and developers manage the preconstruction process.
summary.zh: 協助總承包商與開發商管理施工前流程的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Provides an intuitive AI platform positioned as construction's AI layer for managing the preconstruction and permitting process.
highlight.zh: 提供直覺的 AI 平台,定位為建築業的 AI 層,用於管理施工前與許可流程。

summary.en: Identity verification API enabling businesses to verify individuals and businesses across emerging markets.
summary.zh: 讓企業在新興市場驗證個人與企業身分的身分驗證 API。

highlight.en: Lets digital businesses verify both individuals and companies within seconds across emerging markets. Formerly Identitypass.
highlight.zh: 讓數位企業能在數秒內跨新興市場驗證個人與公司身分,前身為 Identitypass。

summary.en: Aerospace startup building the first electric business aircraft powered by hydrogen propulsion.
summary.zh: 打造首架氫動力電動商務飛機的航太新創。

highlight.en: Redesigns aircraft around hydrogen-electric propulsion to fly six passengers up to 800 NM, beyond battery range, backed by $50M+ and $1.5bn in LOIs.
highlight.zh: 圍繞氫電推進重新設計飛機,可載六人飛行最多 800 海里,超越純電池航程,獲 5,000 萬美元以上資金與 15 億美元意向書。

summary.en: Restaurant POS platform for Southeast Asia, billed as Toast for the region.
summary.zh: 為東南亞打造的餐廳 POS 平台,號稱東南亞版 Toast。

highlight.en: Beyond online payments, the Hong Kong-based platform lets restaurants market to customers, order from suppliers, and access short-term loans on one system.
highlight.zh: 這家香港平台除線上支付外,還讓餐廳能向顧客行銷、向供應商訂貨並取得短期貸款,全在單一系統。

summary.en: Financial platform giving underbanked workers earned-wage access before payday.
summary.zh: 讓金融服務不足的勞工在發薪日前取得已賺工資的金融平台。

highlight.en: Partners with corporate employers to offer a mobile app as an employee benefit, aiming to change how underbanked workers earn, spend, save, and invest.
highlight.zh: 與企業雇主合作,將行動應用程式作為員工福利提供,旨在改變金融服務不足勞工的賺取、消費、儲蓄與投資方式。

summary.en: Banking service operating entirely in Spanish for the 44 million US Spanish speakers.
summary.zh: 為全美 4,400 萬西語使用者提供全西班牙語服務的銀行。

highlight.en: Aims to be the easiest way for Spanish-speaking customers to get a bank account and later credit, with a mission to end pressing dial #2 for espanol.
highlight.zh: 力求成為西語顧客開戶最簡便的方式,並擴及信貸,使命是終結「西語請按 2」的困擾。

summary.en: Device turning breast milk into a shelf-stable powder that stays biologically active for six months.
summary.zh: 將母乳轉化為可常溫保存六個月且維持生物活性粉末的裝置。

highlight.en: Its condensing device powders milk while sparing the biome, freeing NICU nurses from the daily milk shift, with peer-reviewed use in 20+ Tri-State hospitals.
highlight.zh: 其濃縮裝置在保留菌相下將母乳製成粉末,讓加護病房護理人員免於每日解凍工作,成果經同儕審查並用於 20 多家三州醫院。

summary.en: Care navigation service using AI to help dementia patients age at home.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 協助失智症患者在家安養的照護導航服務。

highlight.en: Provides non-clinical coaching the team says can avoid 30% of hospitalizations for dementia patients, a service Medicare has recently begun reimbursing.
highlight.zh: 提供非臨床指導,團隊表示可避免失智症患者 30% 的住院,此服務近期已開始獲 Medicare 給付。

summary.en: Platform making private healthcare in India accessible by splitting bills into monthly installments.
summary.zh: 透過將帳單分期付款讓印度私人醫療更可及的平台。

highlight.en: Connects patients with nearby practices and lets them pay in installments, in a market where over 80% of healthcare spend is out of pocket.
highlight.zh: 連接患者與鄰近醫療院所並讓他們分期付款,瞄準逾八成醫療支出由病患自付的市場。

summary.en: Plug-and-play AI platform with sensors and dashboards giving manufacturers real-time machine visibility.
summary.zh: 以感測器與儀表板讓製造商即時掌握機台狀況的隨插即用 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Combines AI hardware and software to track machine utilization and downtime and automate maintenance, claiming ROI in under a month, used by Parker Hannifin.
highlight.zh: 結合 AI 硬體與軟體追蹤機台利用率與停機並自動化維護,宣稱一個月內回本,客戶包括 Parker Hannifin。

summary.en: AI-native platform helping government contractors win and execute government contracts.
summary.zh: 協助政府承包商贏得並執行政府合約的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: Supports government contractors across capture, proposals, and post-award execution on one AI-native platform to win work faster and deliver successfully.
highlight.zh: 在單一 AI 原生平台上支援政府承包商的商機開發、投標與得標後執行,以更快贏得合約並順利交付。

summary.en: Automated opt-out software removing private information from data brokers across the internet.
summary.zh: 自動將私人資訊從網路資料仲介商移除的退出軟體。

highlight.en: Removes personal data from hundreds of data brokers for individuals, families, and businesses, earning PCMag's Editors' Choice award in personal data removal.
highlight.zh: 為個人、家庭與企業從數百家資料仲介商移除個資,並榮獲 PCMag 個資移除類別的編輯選擇獎。

summary.en: Platform digitizing and processing cash-based microtransactions across Africa's informal sector.
summary.zh: 將非洲非正式經濟現金微型交易數位化並處理的平台。

highlight.en: Processes cash-based microtransactions such as bus-ride payments across Africa's informal sector, today helping over 300,000 people make these payments.
highlight.zh: 處理非洲非正式經濟中如公車車資等現金微型交易,目前協助逾 30 萬人完成這類付款。

summary.en: Software helping online resellers manage and crosspost listings across multiple marketplaces.
summary.zh: 協助線上轉售者跨多個市集管理並同步刊登商品的軟體。

highlight.en: Lets resellers crosspost items to 10 marketplaces including eBay, Poshmark, and Etsy far faster than manually, plus delisting, inventory, and analytics tools.
highlight.zh: 讓轉售者以遠快於手動的速度,將商品同步刊登到 eBay、Poshmark 與 Etsy 等 10 個市集,並提供下架、庫存與分析工具。

summary.en: Intelligent knowledge platform helping teams create and maintain documentation for humans and AI.
summary.zh: 協助團隊為人類與 AI 建立並維護文件的智慧知識平台。

highlight.en: Focuses on helping teams build and maintain world-class documentation designed to serve both human readers and AI systems.
highlight.zh: 專注於協助團隊打造並維護同時服務人類讀者與 AI 系統的世界級文件。

summary.en: Reselling marketplace letting social-media micro-entrepreneurs in Pakistan source wholesale products.
summary.zh: 讓巴基斯坦社群媒體微型創業者批貨的轉售市集。

highlight.en: Lets WhatsApp, Facebook, and Instagram sellers start a business with no investment by handling delivery, payments, and service, aiming to empower 5M people.
highlight.zh: 透過代理配送、付款與客服,讓 WhatsApp、Facebook 與 Instagram 賣家零投資創業,目標賦能 500 萬以上的人。

summary.en: Enterprise platform detecting deepfakes to protect organizations from real-time and agentic fraud.
summary.zh: 偵測深偽以保護組織免於即時與代理式詐騙的企業平台。

highlight.en: Positions itself as the market leader in deepfake detection, protecting enterprises and governments from real-time deepfake and agentic fraud, per Gartner.
highlight.zh: 自我定位為深偽偵測的市場領導者,保護企業與政府免於即時深偽與代理式詐騙,並獲 Gartner 於 2025 年認可。

summary.en: Digitizes Indonesia's MSME supply chain via wholesale and bookkeeping, billed as Faire for Indonesia.
summary.zh: 以批發與記帳將印尼中小微企業供應鏈數位化的平台,號稱印尼版 Faire。

highlight.en: Its CrediMart wholesale platform offers online ordering, BNPL, and logistics, while CrediBook lets MSMEs generate financial reports in under five minutes.
highlight.zh: 其 CrediMart 批發平台提供線上下單、先買後付與物流,而 CrediBook 讓中小微企業在五分鐘內產出財報。

summary.en: Company building a global satellite network any Bluetooth device can connect to without cell coverage.
summary.zh: 打造任何藍牙裝置無需行動訊號即可連線的全球衛星網路的公司。

highlight.en: Aims to connect any Bluetooth device to a global satellite network even without cellular reception, with a mission to link a billion devices.
highlight.zh: 目標讓任何藍牙裝置即使沒有行動訊號也能連上全球衛星網路,使命是連結十億台裝置。

summary.en: Corporate spend and financial platform for small businesses in Indonesia, billed as Brex for Indonesia.
summary.zh: 為印尼小型企業打造的企業支出與金融平台,號稱印尼版 Brex。

highlight.en: Positions itself as Brex for small businesses in Indonesia, providing a financial platform tailored to the local market.
highlight.zh: 自我定位為印尼小型企業的 Brex,提供因應當地市場的金融平台。

summary.en: Latin America's first rent payment platform rewarding tenants and landlords for paying rent.
summary.zh: 拉美首個讓房客與房東因繳租而獲得回饋的租金支付平台。

highlight.en: Turns one of households' biggest monthly expenses into rewards, letting tenants pay rent by any method, build credit, and save toward a home down payment.
highlight.zh: 將家庭最大的每月支出之一轉為回饋,讓房客以任何方式繳租、累積信用並為購屋頭期款儲蓄。

summary.en: B2B ordering platform connecting restaurants with food suppliers in the Middle East.
summary.zh: 在中東連接餐廳與食材供應商的 B2B 下單平台。

highlight.en: Bills itself as the largest B2B ordering platform for restaurants and suppliers in the Middle East, managing orders end to end. Formerly Elkaso.
highlight.zh: 自稱中東最大的餐廳與供應商 B2B 下單平台,端到端管理訂貨流程,前身為 Elkaso。

summary.en: Vertically integrated AI platform replacing security and compliance headcount with AI agents and engineers.
summary.zh: 以 AI 代理與工程師取代資安與合規人力的垂直整合 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Pairs forward-deployed engineers with proprietary AI agents to run security and compliance programs, achieving SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA via Vanta and Drata.
highlight.zh: 以前進部署工程師搭配自有 AI 代理營運資安與合規計畫,透過 Vanta 與 Drata 達成 SOC 2、ISO 27001 與 HIPAA。

summary.en: Clinical AI automating medical coding by converting patient charts into insurance claims.
summary.zh: 以臨床 AI 將病歷轉為保險理賠以自動化醫療編碼的公司。

highlight.en: Converts charts into claims with 96% accurate codes and zero human intervention, integrating with Epic and Cerner to cut undercoding 11% and denials 43%.
highlight.zh: 以 96% 準確的編碼且零人工介入將病歷轉為理賠,與 Epic、Cerner 整合,降低 11% 編碼不足與 43% 拒付。

summary.en: Subscription streaming platform offering Islamic cartoons and shows for Muslim children.
summary.zh: 為穆斯林兒童提供伊斯蘭卡通與節目的訂閱串流平台。

highlight.en: Creates high-quality Islamic content for an underserved market of 70 million Muslim families, from a team whose prior cartoon drew 3 billion YouTube views.
highlight.zh: 為網路上 7,000 萬個服務不足的穆斯林家庭創作高品質伊斯蘭內容,團隊先前的卡通曾在 YouTube 累積逾 30 億次觀看。

summary.en: Employee up-skilling platform offering continuous learning tracks for fast-growing companies.
summary.zh: 為快速成長企業提供持續學習路徑的員工技能提升平台。

highlight.en: Delivers learning tracks customized to business goals across sales, management, tech, and product, powered by 3,000+ experts from 500+ brands in 40+ countries.
highlight.zh: 提供因應業務目標客製、涵蓋業務、管理、技術與產品的學習路徑,由 40 多國、500 多個品牌的 3,000 多位專家支援。

summary.en: Home decor destination bringing floor and wall materials direct from manufacturers to Indian homeowners.
summary.zh: 將地板與牆面材料從製造商直送印度屋主的居家裝飾平台。

highlight.en: Sells tiles, laminates, and wall panels direct from manufacturers, using online engagement for real-time trend insights to launch designs faster and cheaper.
highlight.zh: 以製造商直售磁磚、美耐板與牆板,並透過線上互動取得即時趨勢洞察,更快、更便宜地推出新設計。

summary.en: Platform using agentic workflows to automate finance and back-office operations.
summary.zh: 以代理式工作流程自動化財務與後勤作業的平台。

highlight.en: With agentic workflows and one-click ERP integrations, it automates invoice-to-cash and procure-to-pay, claiming to save 1,000 man-hours a month.
highlight.zh: 以代理式工作流程與一鍵 ERP 整合,自動化從開票到收款與採購到付款,宣稱每月省下 1,000 工時。

summary.en: Compliance platform automating KYC and AML processes for financial companies in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉美金融公司自動化 KYC 與 AML 流程的合規平台。

highlight.en: Automates compliance for financial entities across KYC/KYB, AML, risk profiling, documentation management, and regulatory reporting.
highlight.zh: 為金融機構自動化涵蓋 KYC/KYB、AML、風險評等、文件管理與法規申報的合規流程。

summary.en: All-in-one project management software for small construction businesses in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉美小型營造企業打造的一站式專案管理軟體。

highlight.en: Helps remodelers, contractors, and architects cut up to 50% of manual procurement and estimation work, managing projects end to end in one place.
highlight.zh: 協助裝修商、承包商與建築師將採購與估算的手動工作減少最多 50%,在單一平台端到端管理專案。

summary.en: Enterprise software helping companies track and reduce their carbon emissions.
summary.zh: 協助企業追蹤並減少碳排放的企業軟體。

highlight.en: Used in 48+ countries, it applies AI/ML to turn operational data into full carbon supply chain data, backed by Sequoia and Y Combinator.
highlight.zh: 在 48 個以上國家使用,運用 AI/ML 將營運資料轉為完整碳供應鏈資料,獲 Sequoia 與 Y Combinator 支持。

summary.en: Banking and funding platform giving startups deposits, payments, and non-dilutive financing in one place.
summary.zh: 在單一平台為新創提供存款、付款與非稀釋融資的銀行與資金平台。

highlight.en: Lets startups store deposits, manage payments, diversify cash, and access non-dilutive financing in one place, backed by Left Lane Capital and NFX.
highlight.zh: 讓新創在單一平台存放存款、管理付款、分散現金並取得非稀釋融資,獲 Left Lane Capital 與 NFX 支持。

summary.en: Open-source platform for feature flagging and A/B testing on a company's own data.
summary.zh: 在企業自有資料上進行功能旗標與 A/B 測試的開源平台。

highlight.en: Uses a company's existing data infrastructure rather than sending data to a vendor, avoiding the cost, compliance issues, and lock-in of SaaS like LaunchDarkly.
highlight.zh: 使用企業既有的資料基礎設施而非將資料送往第三方,避免 LaunchDarkly 等工具的高成本、合規問題與廠商鎖定。

summary.en: Company building electric and hybrid propulsion systems for large ships and unmanned cargo vessels.
summary.zh: 為大型船舶與無人貨輪打造電動與混合動力推進系統的公司。

highlight.en: Builds electric and hybrid propulsion for large ships and is developing unmanned cargo vessels, with a vision of making all ships robots.
highlight.zh: 為大型船舶打造電動與混合動力推進系統,並開發無人貨輪,願景是讓所有船舶都成為機器人。

summary.en: Platform providing privacy, security, and compliance solutions to make enterprise AI compliance-ready.
summary.zh: 提供隱私、資安與合規方案讓企業 AI 達合規標準的平台。

highlight.en: Offers end-to-end privacy, security, and compliance solutions to prepare organizations for emerging AI regulations.
highlight.zh: 提供端到端的隱私、資安與合規解決方案,協助組織因應新興的 AI 法規。

summary.en: Food delivery platform for Africa, billed as DoorDash for Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲打造的送餐平台,號稱非洲版 DoorDash。

highlight.en: Says it makes a profit on every delivery from day one, targeting urban Millennial and Gen Z professionals across Africa's top 70 cities in a $51B market.
highlight.zh: 宣稱每筆配送從第一天起就有利潤,鎖定非洲前 70 大城市的都會千禧與 Z 世代專業人士,市場規模估為 510 億美元。

summary.en: Restaurant operations platform using AI agents to run financial and operational workflows.
summary.zh: 以 AI 代理執行財務與營運工作流程的餐廳營運平台。

highlight.en: Pairs a system of record with AI agents that autonomously execute workflows like reconciliation, invoice validation, and incident resolution.
highlight.zh: 結合記錄系統與 AI 代理,自主執行對帳、發票驗證與事件處理等工作流程。

summary.en: Multi-asset trading platform built for retail investors in Vietnam.
summary.zh: 為越南散戶投資人打造的多資產交易平台。

highlight.en: Aims to democratize wealth management for Vietnam's underserved retail investors across stocks and commodities, backed by YC and Goodwater Capital.
highlight.zh: 力求為越南服務不足的散戶投資人普及財富管理,涵蓋股票與商品,獲 YC、Goodwater 與 Global Founders Capital 支持。

summary.en: On-demand provider of clean meat to households and food businesses via a WhatsApp chatbot.
summary.zh: 透過 WhatsApp 聊天機器人為家庭與餐飲業者隨需供應乾淨肉品的服務。

highlight.en: Built a WhatsApp chatbot letting customers order meat and receive it within three hours, serving both individuals and food businesses.
highlight.zh: 打造 WhatsApp 聊天機器人,讓顧客訂購肉品並於三小時內收貨,服務個人與餐飲業者。

summary.en: AI platform accelerating the discovery and design of DNA- and RNA-based therapies.
summary.zh: 加速 DNA 與 RNA 療法發現與設計的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Developed an AI platform to speed the discovery and design of genomic therapies including cell, RNA, and DNA therapies.
highlight.zh: 開發一套 AI 平台,以加速包含細胞、RNA 與 DNA 療法在內的基因組療法的發現與設計。

summary.en: Company bringing non-invasive brain stimulation treatment from the hospital into the home.
summary.zh: 將非侵入式腦刺激治療從醫院帶進家中的公司。

highlight.en: Its device delivers FDA-cleared non-invasive brain stimulation at home with the same efficacy, in FDA pivotal phase for depression and pilot for Alzheimer's.
highlight.zh: 其裝置在家中提供 FDA 核准、療效相同的非侵入式腦刺激,憂鬱症處於 FDA 關鍵試驗、阿茲海默症處於試點階段。

summary.en: Financial operations platform deploying AI across the construction industry's legacy systems.
summary.zh: 在建築業老舊系統上部署 AI 的財務作業平台。

highlight.en: Spent three years building rails to read and write across construction's decades-old, API-less software, deploying AI for invoicing with 500+ customers.
highlight.zh: 花三年打造能讀寫建築業數十年無 API 老舊軟體的串接管道,將 AI 用於開票與帳務,擁有 500 多家客戶。

summary.en: AI-powered content creation infrastructure apps embed to build emails, pages, and documents.
summary.zh: 供應用程式嵌入以製作電子郵件、網頁與文件的 AI 內容創作基礎設施。

highlight.en: Lets developers embed visual builders for emails, pages, and documents and connect them to AI agents, templates, and APIs to create content in their product.
highlight.zh: 讓開發者嵌入電子郵件、網頁與文件的視覺化編輯器,並串接 AI 代理、範本與 API,在自家產品內建立內容。

summary.en: Open-source, serverless vector database for production-scale generative AI.
summary.zh: 為生產級生成式 AI 打造的開源無伺服器向量資料庫。

highlight.en: Built around a new columnar data format, it supports low-latency billion-scale vector search on a single node for generative AI, recsys, and search.
highlight.zh: 圍繞全新欄式資料格式打造,可在單一節點支援低延遲、十億級向量搜尋,適用生成式 AI、推薦系統與搜尋。

summary.en: Centralized platform providing observability and governance for AI-generated Python scripts.
summary.zh: 為 AI 生成的 Python 腳本提供可觀測性與治理的集中式平台。

highlight.en: Unifies AI- or human-generated Python scripts under a single governance framework, letting organizations scale with orchestration, observability, and security.
highlight.zh: 在單一治理框架下統合由 AI 或人類產生的 Python 腳本,讓組織能透過編排、可觀測性與安全進行擴展。

summary.en: AI solution that streamlines candidate screening and recruitment around the clock.
summary.zh: 全天候簡化人選篩選與招募的 AI 解決方案。

highlight.en: Acts as a 24/7 AI recruiting team engaging every candidate in their language, letting companies evaluate 100% of applicants while easing recruiter workload.
highlight.zh: 如同全天候運作的 AI 招募團隊,以每位人選偏好的語言與其互動,讓企業評估 100% 的應徵者並減輕招募人員負擔。

summary.en: AI-native AML compliance platform for fintechs and banks across six continents.
summary.zh: 橫跨六大洲、為金融科技與銀行打造的 AI 原生 AML 合規平台。

highlight.en: Helps fintechs and banks monitor, screen, and report transactions for financial crime, pioneering generative AI for AML so they scale without adding headcount.
highlight.zh: 協助金融科技與銀行針對金融犯罪風險監控、篩查與申報交易,率先將生成式 AI 用於 AML,讓客戶不擴增人力即可擴展。

summary.en: Platform modernizing specialty insurance by letting insurers sell and manage policies in minutes.
summary.zh: 讓保險商能在數分鐘內銷售與管理保單以現代化特殊保險的平台。

highlight.en: Connects agents and insurers to automate the email-driven workflows behind $200B of specialty insurance like Cyber, Flood, and Trucking.
highlight.zh: 連接代理人與保險商,自動化網路險、水災險與貨運險等價值 2,000 億美元特殊保險背後以電子郵件處理的流程。

summary.en: Agentic AI solution for fixed income research, credit analysis, and portfolio optimization.
summary.zh: 用於固定收益研究、信用分析與投資組合優化的代理式 AI 解決方案。

highlight.en: Serves buy-side and wealth managers with agentic AI that makes analysis faster and cheaper while unlocking work that could not be done manually before.
highlight.zh: 以代理式 AI 服務買方與財富管理機構,讓分析更快、更省成本,並解鎖過去無法靠人工完成的工作。

summary.en: Platform using generative AI to virtualize the staffing infrastructure of clinics.
summary.zh: 運用生成式 AI 將診所人力基礎設施虛擬化的平台。

highlight.en: Uses generative AI to recreate front-desk, medical-assistant, and scribe roles so doctors spin up virtual clinics, claiming $1M new annual revenue per clinic.
highlight.zh: 運用生成式 AI 重現櫃台、醫療助理與抄寫員功能,讓醫師隨需開設虛擬診所,宣稱每家年增 100 萬美元營收。

summary.en: Access control management app for gated communities in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉美封閉式社區打造的門禁管理應用程式。

highlight.en: Replaces broken intercoms by connecting guards, residents, and admins via an app and tablet, so a guard scans a visitor's ID and the resident approves entry.
highlight.zh: 以應用程式與平板連接警衛、住戶與管理者取代故障對講機,警衛掃描訪客證件後,住戶即可核准進入。

summary.en: Group buying platform for fresh produce in Indonesia's tier 2 cities.
summary.zh: 為印尼二線城市提供生鮮農產品的團購平台。

highlight.en: Bills itself as the first group buying platform for fresh produce in Indonesia's tier 2 cities, using an agent network to deliver produce cheaper than retail.
highlight.zh: 自稱印尼二線城市首個生鮮農產品團購平台,透過代理人網絡以低於零售的價格配送農產品。

summary.en: SaaS enabling banks in Latin America to digitize loan origination and account opening.
summary.zh: 讓拉美銀行將貸款核發與開戶數位化的 SaaS。

highlight.en: Gives banks a fintech-style loan origination and account-opening process, already live with 30 clients including 7 banks across 9 countries.
highlight.zh: 為銀行提供金融科技風格的貸款核發與開戶流程,已在 9 國上線,服務 30 家客戶,含 7 家銀行。

summary.en: Buy Now, Pay Later digital payment method for underbanked consumers in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉美金融服務不足消費者打造的先買後付數位支付方式。

highlight.en: Integrates into online merchant checkout to offer the 200 million underbanked consumers without credit cards installment payments, expanding merchant sales.
highlight.zh: 整合進線上商家結帳流程,為 2 億名沒有信用卡的金融服務不足消費者提供分期付款,擴大商家銷售。

summary.en: AI-driven infrastructure helping insurers and healthcare providers automate claims and reduce fraud.
summary.zh: 協助保險商與醫療院所自動化理賠並降低詐欺的 AI 基礎設施。

highlight.en: Builds AI infrastructure for payors, TPAs, and providers to automate claims processing, reduce fraud, and streamline operations.
highlight.zh: 為支付方、第三方管理機構與醫療提供者打造 AI 基礎設施,以自動化理賠、降低詐欺並簡化營運。

summary.en: Anti-fraud infrastructure helping businesses verify identities and onboard users faster.
summary.zh: 協助企業驗證身分並加速用戶導入的反詐欺基礎設施。

highlight.en: Provides APIs and no-code tools for KYC/KYB and AI fraud detection, using government data lookups and biometrics so businesses scale while staying compliant.
highlight.zh: 提供 KYC/KYB 與 AI 詐欺偵測的 API 與無程式碼工具,運用政府資料查詢與生物辨識,讓企業在合規下擴展。

summary.en: Infrastructure platform helping companies protect users from AI abuse and online harm.
summary.zh: 協助企業保護用戶免於 AI 濫用與線上傷害的基礎設施平台。

highlight.en: Gives companies end-to-end tools to orchestrate content moderation and AI safety at scale, serving customers from frontier AI labs to e-commerce and social.
highlight.zh: 為企業提供端到端工具,大規模編排內容審查與 AI 安全,客戶涵蓋前沿 AI 實驗室到電商與社群媒體。

summary.en: User research CRM automating outreach, scheduling, and participant management for research teams.
summary.zh: 為研究團隊自動化外聯、排程與受訪者管理的使用者研究 CRM。

highlight.en: Replaces messy spreadsheets and disjointed tooling by automating outreach, scheduling, incentives, and participant management, saving teams hours each week.
highlight.zh: 以自動化外聯、排程、獎勵與受訪者管理取代雜亂的試算表與零散工具,每週為團隊省下數小時。

summary.en: Pakistan's first and only licensed digital wealth manager.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦首間也是唯一持牌的數位財富管理機構。

highlight.en: Capitalizes on a 2021 rule allowing digital onboarding in a market where only 0.02% have retirement accounts, now licensed to create its own funds and ETFs.
highlight.zh: 把握 2021 年允許數位開戶的法規,切入僅 0.02% 人口有退休帳戶的市場,如今獲准如 Vanguard 般自設基金與 ETF。

summary.en: Digital tools for data collection, monitoring, and certification of forest carbon projects.
summary.zh: 為森林碳專案提供資料蒐集、監測與認證數位工具的公司。

highlight.en: Helps at-risk European forest owners start carbon projects for new income; it later merged with Tree.ly to form Europe's largest forest carbon platform.
highlight.zh: 協助面臨高氣候風險的歐洲林地所有者啟動碳專案以獲取新收入,後與 Tree.ly 合併成為歐洲最大的森林碳平台。

summary.en: Embedded finance infrastructure letting LatAm enterprises offer financial capabilities via API.
summary.zh: 讓拉美企業透過 API 提供金融功能的嵌入式金融基礎設施。

highlight.en: Provides an API-first platform so any LatAm company can offer wallets, real-time payouts, Visa cards, and multi-rail bank transfers without becoming a fintech.
highlight.zh: 提供以 API 為先的平台,讓任何拉美公司無需自建金融科技即可提供電子錢包、即時撥款、Visa 卡與多管道銀行轉帳。

summary.en: API helping travel companies sell airport transportation online.
summary.zh: 協助旅遊公司線上銷售機場接送的 API。

highlight.en: Provides an API for travel companies to sell airport transportation online, helping them increase profits by up to 20% per transaction.
highlight.zh: 為旅遊公司提供線上銷售機場接送的 API,協助每筆交易最多提升 20% 利潤。

summary.en: Payroll and payment automation platform powering easy payroll and financial access in Africa.
summary.zh: 在非洲提供便利薪資與金融服務的薪資與支付自動化平台。

highlight.en: Its Payroll API automates salary payments, tax deductions, and compliance, while early wage access tools give workers more control, serving 10k+ businesses.
highlight.zh: 其薪資 API 自動化薪資發放、稅務扣繳與合規,而提前領薪工具讓勞工更能掌控收入,目前服務逾 1 萬家企業。

summary.en: Space data company capturing high-resolution hyperspectral images of Earth from satellites.
summary.zh: 以衛星拍攝地球高解析超光譜影像的太空資料公司。

highlight.en: Aims to capture the highest-resolution hyperspectral images from satellites costing 100x less than those using traditional telescopes.
highlight.zh: 目標以成本比採用傳統望遠鏡衛星低 100 倍的衛星,拍攝最高解析度的超光譜影像。

summary.en: Service renting out investors' properties by the room for affordable housing and higher returns.
summary.zh: 以分房出租投資人房產來提供平價住房並提高報酬的服務。

highlight.en: Sources, renovates, and manages homes rented by the room, claiming about 22% ROI and returns up to 50% higher; grew from 1 home in 2018 to 105 across 31 cities.
highlight.zh: 負責採購、整修並管理分房出租的住宅,宣稱約 22% 投報率、報酬最多高 50%,並從 2018 年的 1 戶成長到橫跨 31 城的 105 戶。

summary.en: Data analytics software to manage, analyze, and optimize biomanufacturing processes.
summary.zh: 用於管理、分析與優化生物製造流程的資料分析軟體。

highlight.en: Builds software to manage, analyze, and optimize bioprocessing data, with initial customers being bio-industrial companies producing in bioreactors.
highlight.zh: 打造管理、分析與優化生物製程資料的軟體,首批客戶為在生物反應器中生產的生物工業公司。

summary.en: Software helping solar utilities automatically predict and prevent plant downtime.
summary.zh: 協助太陽能業者自動預測並防止電廠停機的軟體。

highlight.en: Reads live data from solar plants and runs algorithms to diagnose underperformance, claiming $200k extra income per plant; used by 40+ developers across 3 GW.
highlight.zh: 讀取太陽能電廠即時資料並執行演算法診斷效能不佳,宣稱每座電廠額外創造 20 萬美元收入,已被 40 多家開發商用於 3 GW。

summary.en: Personal finance app integrating money management and investing, billed as Indonesia's Wealthfront.
summary.zh: 整合理財與投資的個人理財應用程式,號稱印尼版 Wealthfront。

highlight.en: Combines money management and investing in one app so users see net worth and cash flow while accessing pre-built portfolios with automatic rebalancing.
highlight.zh: 在單一應用程式結合理財與投資,讓用戶查看淨資產與現金流,並使用具自動再平衡的預建投資組合。

summary.en: Financial data enrichment API turning cryptic transaction data into usable merchant intelligence.
summary.zh: 將難解交易資料轉為可用商家情報的金融資料豐富化 API。

highlight.en: Uses a vast ground-truth merchant data set to decipher cryptic transactions, helping customers underwrite, detect fraud, and understand spending habits.
highlight.zh: 運用龐大的真實商家資料集解讀難解交易,協助客戶承保、偵測詐欺並了解消費習慣。

summary.en: Real-time retrieval engine powering search, feeds, and agents in milliseconds.
summary.zh: 以毫秒級驅動搜尋、動態消息與代理的即時檢索引擎。

highlight.en: Lets teams connect data, train models, and retrieve relevant results in milliseconds from text, user, or session context, with cases showing revenue gains.
highlight.zh: 讓團隊串接資料、訓練模型,並在毫秒內從文字、用戶或工作階段情境取得相關結果,案例顯示帶來營收成長。

summary.en: Subscription service giving Asia access to consumer electronics from phones to VR and wearables.
summary.zh: 讓亞洲以訂閱方式取得手機到 VR 與穿戴裝置等消費電子的服務。

highlight.en: Advances the circular economy by letting customers subscribe to tech monthly, keep, buy, or return it, then refurbishing returns to extend each device's life.
highlight.zh: 以讓顧客按月訂閱、保留、購買或退還科技產品推動循環經濟,並將退回品翻新以延長每台裝置的使用壽命。

summary.en: Working capital and payments platform for Brazilian restaurants.
summary.zh: 為巴西餐廳提供營運資金與支付的平台。

highlight.en: Solves restaurant cash flow problems by letting them shop for supplies and pay other bills using Pantore's credit line.
highlight.zh: 透過讓餐廳以 Pantore 的信用額度採購物資並支付其他帳單,解決餐廳的現金流問題。

summary.en: Game-based savings and investment app for India's Gen Z and young millennials.
summary.zh: 為印度 Z 世代與年輕千禧族打造的遊戲化儲蓄與投資應用程式。

highlight.en: Merges gaming and finance so every rupee saved earns a token to play for weekly prizes; it onboarded 250,000 users in 12 weeks, 88% first-time investors.
highlight.zh: 融合遊戲與金融,每存一盧比即獲一枚代幣參與每週獎金活動,12 週內導入 25 萬名用戶,其中 88% 為首次投資者。

summary.en: Traceable AI workspace for high-stakes risk decisions across infrastructure, mining, and insurance.
summary.zh: 為基礎設施、礦業與保險的高風險決策打造的可溯源 AI 工作空間。

highlight.en: Its TRAIL workspace unifies geospatial data, geotechnical studies, satellite pipelines, and catastrophe models for risk engineers, underwriters, and owners.
highlight.zh: 其 TRAIL 工作空間整合地理空間資料、岩土研究、衛星資料管道與災難模型,服務風險工程師、核保人與資產所有者。

summary.en: Insurtech disrupting India's insurance market by empowering agents with innovative products.
summary.zh: 以創新產品賦能代理人來顛覆印度保險市場的保險科技公司。

highlight.en: Targets the white space of illness-specific, primary-care, and surgical insurance through agents, India's largest channel, who handle 85% of premium collection.
highlight.zh: 透過印度最大的分銷管道──佔保費收取 85% 的代理人,瞄準特定疾病、基層照護與手術保險的市場空白。

summary.en: Expense management solution merging software and corporate cards for SMEs.
summary.zh: 為中小企業整合軟體與企業卡的費用管理解決方案。

highlight.en: Modernizes finance for SMEs by merging software and intelligent corporate cards into a single unified expense management platform.
highlight.zh: 透過將軟體與智慧企業卡整合為單一統一的費用管理平台,為中小企業現代化財務。
